description: Planning-only proposal for optional fan-control variants of the Bathroom and Kitchen PoE room bundles. These are NOT released firmware and are NOT promoted to WebFlash. Base room bundles remain the primary product line; these variants are Bathroom/Kitchen-only add-ons that would be built and validated in a future PR.
non_goals: No firmware release or artifact build is implied by this file.
No WebFlash promotion or webflash_build_matrix changes.
No changes to existing room bundle SKUs or their lifecycle.
No TRIAC-based fan control variant (explicitly out of scope).
No fan variants for Corridor, Living, or Bedroom bundles.

fan_control_methods.relay: On/off switching of an external fan via a dry-contact relay. Simple, robust, not speed-variable.
fan_control_methods.dac_0_10v: Analog 0-10V speed control for EC/MVHR fans via a DAC output. Continuous speed control.
fan_control_methods.pwm: PWM speed control for compatible fans. Continuous speed control via duty cycle.

variants.notes: Relay on/off extract fan control for the Bathroom PoE bundle. Not runtime-interchangeable with DAC or PWM variants.
Analog 0-10V speed control for the Bathroom PoE bundle. Not runtime-interchangeable with relay or PWM variants.
PWM speed control for the Bathroom PoE bundle. Not runtime-interchangeable with relay or DAC variants.
Analog 0-10V speed control for the Kitchen PoE bundle, framed as extract/MVHR/EC boost (not a cooker-hood replacement). Not runtime-interchangeable with relay or PWM variants.
Relay on/off extract fan control for the Kitchen PoE bundle, framed as extract/MVHR/EC boost (not a cooker-hood replacement). Not runtime-interchangeable with DAC or PWM variants.

planning_notes.option_chosen: Option A — separate config file so the stable room-bundle matrix stays clean.
planning_notes.interchangeability: relay vs DAC(0-10V) vs PWM are hardware-distinct and NOT runtime-interchangeable; each is a separate variant SKU.
planning_notes.sku_vs_config: Bundle SKUs are kept separate from firmware config strings; this file does not define firmware config identifiers.
planning_notes.webflash: No variant is exposed to WebFlash; webflash_exposed is false for all and no webflash_build_matrix change is implied.
planning_notes.kitchen_framing: Kitchen fan control is framed as extract/MVHR/EC boost, not a cooker-hood replacement.
planning_notes.next_steps: A future implementation PR would define firmware configs, build artifacts, and validation before any WebFlash promotion.
